examples: The end of the island is like a prow of a huge leafy ship.
Zhou Shan stood in the prow, a long spear in his hand, cried, “Who are you dare to hinder your mistress’s way?”
A motorboat designed so that the prow and much of the hull lift out of the water and skim the surface at high speeds.
The vast, blue-tinted icebergs that drift here are best viewed from the prow of a Zodiac inflatable boat.
The sharp exterior corners of the building resemble the prow of a ship.
